strengths: Strong SQL and Python hands-on experience
Proven ETL and data modeling expertise
Visualization and reporting proficiency (Power BI, Tableau)
weaknesses: No AML or fraud detection domain experience stated
improvement_bullets: Developed comprehensive functional specifications and technical requirements for software features, collaborating with product teams to align deliverables with business objectives within an Agile/Scrum framework.

Utilized Jupyter Notebooks for exploratory data analysis (EDA) and iterative modeling, processing large datasets to identify suspicious patterns indicative of potential fraud or policy non-compliance.
Leveraged experience in SaaS architecture and web-based product delivery to optimize internal workflows, ensuring scalable solutions that meet complex regulatory and compliance standards.
Applied rigorous analytical techniques to loan portfolio datasets to detect anomalies, effectively acting as an AML (Anti-Money Laundering) analyst to identify high-risk borrower behaviors.

Managed project lifecycles using JIRA and Confluence to document functional requirements and track sprint progress, ensuring adherence to Agile project timelines and proactive resolution of technical blockers.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Business Analyst opportunity with Lorven Technologies Inc. I am interested in this opportunity because of your firm’s reputation for delivering innovative financial crime prevention solutions, a field where data-driven insights are critical to protecting institutional integrity. What interests me about working for Lorven Technologies Inc. is its commitment to supporting complex, highly regulated clients with scalable technical solutions; your focus on blending functional expertise with robust data analysis truly intrigues me. I believe my proficiency in technical data modeling and my experience in translating complex business requirements into actionable specifications would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on cross-functional alignment. In fact, at Haven Technologies, I collaborated with Underwriting, Product, and UI/UX teams to align software features with business objectives. By integrating data from multiple sources and optimizing relational database queries, I reduced project delivery delays by 25% and improved data accuracy, directly contributing to more reliable decision-making. Ultimately, I know that the Business Analyst role at Lorven Technologies Inc. would allow me to bring my analytical rigor to your financial crime prevention initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my technical documentation and project discipline skills. I performed complex EDA on large-scale datasets and translated these statistical insights into comprehensive, stakeholder-ready reports and dashboards. This experience in delivering clear, technical results under project deadlines allowed me to improve city-wide safety reporting efficiency by 20%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my SQL, Python, and Jupyter skills in working on complex fraud detection models at Lorven Technologies Inc. I know that my background in data modeling and my commitment to Agile delivery align with what it takes to succeed at the Business Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
